name: Vercel function errors > 5/min
description: Any control-plane function logging level=error at high rate. Catches downstream provider outages (Resend, Neon, Clerk) and code regressions.
query: ['odoo-saas'] | where level == 'error' | summarize count() by bin(_time, 1m) | where count_ > 5

name: Odoo CRITICAL log line
description: Odoo emits CRITICAL only on registry-init failures, segfaults, missing translations — always operator action.
query: ['odoo-saas'] | where _source startswith 'odoo' | where message contains ' CRITICAL '

name: pgBackRest backup failed
description: Daily pgBackRest base/diff failed on Railway or Fly. Symptom of WAL archiving regression or S3 outage.
query: ['odoo-saas'] | where workflow == 'pgBackRest base backup' | where conclusion == 'failure'

name: Restore drill failed
description: Quarterly drill failed before reaching drill_pass. Backups may be unrestorable.
query: ['odoo-saas'] | where workflow == 'pgBackRest restore drill' | where conclusion == 'failure'

name: Provisioning workflow FatalError
description: provisionTenant or any WDK step FatalError'd — a tenant is stuck pending. Operator must investigate.
query: ['odoo-saas'] | where errorName == 'FatalError' | where workflowRunId is not empty

name: cluster_backups untrusted flags fired
description: The quarterly sweep flagged at least one backup row as untrusted (>12mo without drill). Investigate why drills weren't covering it.
query: ['odoo-saas'] | where route == '/api/internal/cluster-backups' | where msg == 'sweep_untrusted-ok' | where flagged > 0

name: Outbox tick with failures
description: Webhook event handlers failing at the outbox dispatcher. Risk: lost billing/subscription events.

name: Welcome email delivery failed
description: Resend rejected an admin-credentials email. Tenant DB is up but the user hasn't received the password.
query: ['odoo-saas'] | where errorStack contains 'Resend rejected welcome email'
